name: Cowork Scheduled Tasks
description: Replaces ad-hoc scheduled task configuration with a structured JSON registry. config/scheduled-tasks.json defines each task with its agent, cron schedule, plain-English timing, Cowork prompt, and configured status flag. The rigby-scheduled-setup skill reads the registry and presents unconfigured tasks as copy-paste setup cards for Cowork's Scheduled Tasks panel.

files.description: Structured JSON registry of system-classified scheduled tasks — chief-morning, chief-review-auto, and quinn-weekly-review — each with agent, cron schedule, plain-English timing, Cowork prompt, and configured status flag.

New skill that reads config/scheduled-tasks.json, filters unconfigured tasks, and presents each as a copy-paste setup card for Cowork's Scheduled Tasks panel. Marks tasks configured after executive confirmation.

changelog: Add config/scheduled-tasks.json — structured registry of system scheduled tasks with agent, cron, schedule display, Cowork prompt, and configured flag
Add .claude/skills/rigby-scheduled-setup/SKILL.md — skill to surface unconfigured tasks as copy-paste Cowork setup cards and mark them configured after confirmation
